title: Best Supporting Actor - 98th Academy Awards
text: Winner: Sean Penn won the award for his role as Col. Steven J. Lockjaw in One Battle After Another. Nominees: Benicio del Toro, One Battle After Another (as Sensei Sergio St. Carlos), Jacob Elordi, Frankenstein (as The Creature), Delroy Lindo, Sinners (as Delta Slim), Stellan Skarsgård, Sentimental Value (as Gustav Borg). Notable Achievement: Penn's victory marked a significant milestone in Academy history. As stated in the article, he became the fourth male actor (and eighth overall) to win a third acting Oscar. This represents the most acting Oscars earned by any male performer in the award's history. Skarsgård's nomination was also historic, as he became the first actor nominated for Best Actor in a Supporting Role for a non-English language international feature film.
